GetUser: query GetUser($id: ID!) { user(id: $id) { id name email role createdAt address { street city country } } }
ListUsers: query ListUsers { users { id name email role } }
GetMe: query GetMe { me { id name email role metadata } }
GetOrders: query GetOrders($filter: OrderFilterInput) { orders(filter: $filter) { id status total itemCount placedAt } }
CreateUser: mutation CreateUser($input: CreateUserInput!) { createUser(input: $input) { id name email role } }
UpdateUser: mutation UpdateUser($id: ID!, $input: UpdateUserInput!) { updateUser(id: $id, input: $input) { id name email role } }
DeleteUser: mutation DeleteUser($id: ID!) { deleteUser(id: $id) { success message } }
PlaceOrder: mutation PlaceOrder($userId: ID!, $itemCount: Int!, $total: Float!) { placeOrder(userId: $userId, itemCount: $itemCount, total: $total) { id status total itemCount placedAt } }
